name: MINNIE
title: The Dream-chasing Girl

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Anemone
basic.description: MINNIE performs a stylish slash, cutting down enemies with her scythe. Deals Dark elemental damage.

core.name: Iris
core.description: MINNIE leaps forward and slashes downward with her scythe. Deals Dark elemental damage. When this skill hits it [Knocks Down] the target. Enhanced version: Enhanced Iris.

skill.name: Acacia
skill.description: After taking a stance, MINNIE charges in and performs a wide spinning slash. Deals Dark elemental damage. Increases damage dealt to Boss and Elite monsters by 30%. Taking a Counterattack stance grants a [Shield] equal to 10% of MINNIE's Defense when hit; activates Counterattack. When Counterattack is activated it also activates [Critical Hit Rate Increase]: Critical Hit Rate +30% for 20 seconds. Enhanced version: Enhanced Acacia.

skill.name: Allium
skill.description: MINNIE unleashes a fan-shaped blast of energy in front of herself. Deals Dark elemental damage. When this skill hits, it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Increases damage dealt to Normal monsters by 30%. When defeating an enemy, it activates [Critical Hit Damage Increase]: Critical Hit Damage +5%, stacking up to 5 times, Duration: Infinite. Enhanced version: Enhanced Allium.
effects: Critical Hit Damage Increase (+5%, up to 5 stacks)

support.name: Lavender
support.description: MINNIE raises her scythe in a wide upward slash, releasing a blade of energy towards the front. Deals Dark elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

qte.name: Lobelia
qte.description: MINNIE slices forward with the grace and beauty of a butterfly. Deals Dark elemental damage. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, skills that inflict the [Stun] or [Blind] effects, or a Shadow Skill.

ultimate.name: Edelweiss
ultimate.description: MINNIE prepares to strike in a garden of falling petals. Deals Dark elemental damage. When a total of 3 [Falling Petals] are removed the [Bloom] effect activates. When a total of 5 [Falling Petals] are removed it activates the [Full Bloom] effect. [Bloom]: Charges Power Gauge to 100%, Edelweiss changes to Bloom: Oblivia, Critical Hit Rate +30%, Duration: Infinite. [Full Bloom]: Removes [Bloom], Bloom: Oblivia becomes Full Bloom: Oblivia (damage +100%), Critical Hit Rate +50% during Full Bloom: Oblivia, Duration: Infinite.

passive.name: Violet Butterfly / Falling Petals
passive.description: The entire team gains [FOREVER] (+5% damage dealt, stacks up to 3 times, Infinite) when entering the Encore Mission and Instance Dungeon modes. Using Iris decreases the cooldown of Edelweiss by 25s and adds 100% Power Gauge charge (Cooldown: 20s). When Iris hits it applies [Red Spider Lily]: Dark damage taken from MINNIE +30%, 20s. Using Edelweiss activates [Violet Butterfly] and grants 3 [Falling Petals]. When the user tags out, [Violet Butterfly] is removed. [Violet Butterfly]: Activates Core Attack 1 time; Iris, Acacia, or Allium deal +50% additional damage; using them removes 1 [Falling Petal]; [Super Armor] granted while using them; Duration: 20s. [Falling Petals]: When removed, cooldowns of Acacia and Allium are reset; Duration: Infinite (stacks up to 5 times).

advancements: When the user enters the stage their Power Gauge gains 100% charge. [Falling Petals] enhanced: when removed, also activates [Flower's Message: Fragment of Memories] (Defense +10%, Critical Hit Damage +10%, 20s, stacks up to 3 times).
[Red Spider Lily] enhanced: Dark damage taken from MINNIE +50%, 20s. Using Acacia activates [Critical Hit Rate Increase] (+30%, 20s) regardless of Counterattack success.
The user's Basic Skill damage increases by 20%.
Using Edelweiss grants 5 [Falling Petals]. [Flower's Message: Fragment of Memories] enhanced: Defense +20%, Critical Hit Damage +20%, 20s, stacks up to 3 times.
